sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Alvotech Strengthens Biosimilar Portfolio With $27 Million Xbrane R&D Deal - Alvotech  ( NASDAQ:ALVO )
feed.summary: Alvotech acquires Xbrane's R&D operations and biosimilar candidate XB003 for ~$27M, expanding into Sweden's life sciences sector. Xbrane retains key preclinical assets, strengthens finances, and focuses on commercializing Ximluci and Xdivane.
